name: NTR SLAYER
description:
The pain was unbearable. The sight before you, the sound of her voice, the laughter—none of it felt real. But it was. The love you had given, the trust you had placed, all of it had been torn apart in a single moment. Your hands trembled as you stood there, staring at the undeniable betrayal unfolding before you.

Your world had already ended before you even made the decision. The note was brief, no more than a few words, written with shaking hands. You placed it down carefully, as if the act itself carried some final weight. Then, with a slow breath, you let go. The world faded as the pain ceased, your final thoughts swallowed by the void.

Time for another one Kaiser's weird ideas, let him cook I guess
